cookie_description: We use analytics cookies to improve your experience and analyze traffic.
home_hero_description: Explore the largest collection of video memes and share them in 1 click. Add text to make them unique.
home_responsive_description: Petit Mème adapts to you: a smooth and responsive experience on mobile, tablet, and desktop, with nothing to install.
home_responsive_card_text: Perfectly adapts to all screen sizes
home_faq_a1: Petit Mème is an online library that gathers the best video memes from the web. You can browse them, save your favorites and easily share them with your friends.
home_faq_a2: Yes. Access to video memes is completely free. Paid features only cover additional services, such as watermark-free downloads or advanced customization options.
home_faq_q3: Where do the videos come from?
home_faq_a3: The videos come from the internet and social media. Petit Mème does not own the rights to these videos: they are made available for viewing only.
home_faq_q4: Can I upload my own memes?
home_faq_a4: Not at the moment. Only the site administrator can add new memes. But this feature may evolve in the future.
home_faq_q5: What if a video belongs to me or I want it removed?
home_faq_a5: If you own a video and would like it removed, you can contact us directly by email.
home_faq_a6: Petit Mème does not resell videos and does not claim to own the rights. Access is free and intended for personal use, as found on social media. Premium features only cover additional services (unlimited favorites, watermark-free downloads, etc.) and do not grant any commercial rights to the videos.
pricing_description: Choose the plan that fits your needs, from free to unlimited.
pricing_faq_q1: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing_faq_a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription in one click from your settings. You keep Premium access until the end of the paid period, with no hidden fees.
pricing_faq_a2: Choose a meme, add your custom text and the video is generated automatically. Free users get 3 generations, Premium users get unlimited.
pricing_faq_a3: Absolutely. Payments are handled by Stripe, the world leader in online payments. We do not store any banking data. Your personal data is protected in accordance with GDPR.
pricing_faq_q4: How do I switch to the annual plan?
pricing_faq_a4: Simply select "Annual" in the toggle above and click "Upgrade to Premium". If you're already subscribed monthly, you can manage your subscription from your settings.
plan_free_description: Try for free with no time limit. Discover memes, create your first content and save your favorites without entering your credit card.
plan_premium_description: Go unlimited. Create as many videos as you want, save all your favorites and enjoy an experience with no restrictions.
checkout_success_description:
Thank you for your support 🙏
Your purchase is confirmed and your account has been updated. You can now enjoy all your premium features.
meme_search_description: Type, click, laugh: discover all memes in one place.
meme_seo_library_description: Discover the largest meme library: create, explore, and share legendary memes on Petit Meme. Free and accessible to everyone!
meme_seo_category_description: Discover {title} memes. Free and accessible to everyone!
studio_privacy_notice: Everything happens directly on your device. Nothing is sent or stored on our servers — your files stay private.
studio_error: The video engine could not be loaded.
